sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ "المَدِينَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ القَدِيمَةُ" أُنْمُوذَجًا عِمَارِيًّا فَرِيدًا يَنْصَهِرُ فِيهِ المَكَانُ بِالزَّمَانِ، وَتَتَجَسَّدُ فِيهِ فَلْسَفَةُ الِاجْتِمَاعِ البَشَرِيِّ المَبْنِيَّةُ عَلَى التَّكَافُلِ.
sentences.translation: Stari arapski grad predstavlja jedinstven arhitektonski model u kojem se prostor stapa s vremenom, a otjelovljuje se filozofija ljudskog društva zasnovana na solidarnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The 'Old Arab City' represents a unique architectural model where space merges with time, embodying a philosophy of human social interaction based on mutual support.

sentences.arabic: فَالنَّسِيجُ العُمْرَانِيُّ لِلأَحْيَاءِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ، بِأَزِقَّتِهَا المُلْتَوِيَةِ وَدُرُوبِهَا الضَّيِّقَةِ، لَمْ يَكُنْ نِتَاجَ عَفْوِيَّةٍ مُطْلَقَةٍ أَوْ عَبَثٍ تَقْنِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Urbanističko tkivo tradicionalnih četvrti, sa svojim vijugavim uličicama i uskim prolazima, nije bilo proizvod potpune slučajnosti ili tehničkog hira.
sentences.translationEn: The urban fabric of traditional neighborhoods, with their winding alleys and narrow paths, was not the product of absolute spontaneity or technical whim.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ كَانَ اِسْتِجَابَةً لِمُتَطَلَّبَاتٍ مَنَاخِيَّةٍ وَاِجْتِمَاعِيَّةٍ دَقِيقَةٍ تَهْدِفُ إِلَى حِمَايَةِ الفَرْدِ وَالجَمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, bio je to odgovor na precizne klimatske i društvene zahtjeve s ciljem zaštite pojedinca i ljepote.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it was a response to precise climatic and social requirements aimed at protecting the individual and beauty.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ تُوَفِّرُ هَذِهِ التَّعَرُّجَاتُ المَقْصُودَةُ الظِّلَّ الوَفِيرَ لِلْمَارَّةِ وَتَحْمِي السُّكَّانَ مِنْ لَفْحِ الهَجِيرِ وَالرِّيَاحِ العَاتِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove namjerne krivine pružaju obilan hlad prolaznicima i štite stanovnike od jake podnevne vrućine i snažnih vjetrova.
sentences.translationEn: These intentional curves provide ample shade for passersby and protect residents from the scorching midday heat and strong winds.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي قَلْبِ هَذَا النَّسِيجِ، يَبْرُزُ المَسْجِدُ الجَامِعُ كَمَرْكَزٍ رُوحِيٍّ وَتَعْلِيمِيٍّ تَتَفَرَّعُ مِنْهُ الأَسْوَاقُ النَّابِضَةُ.
sentences.translation: U srcu ovog tkiva ističe se centralna džamija kao duhovni i obrazovni centar iz kojeg se granaju živopisne tržnice.
sentences.translationEn: At the heart of this fabric, the congregational mosque stands out as a spiritual and educational center from which vibrant markets branch out.

sentences.arabic: وَتَتَرَتَّبُ هَذِهِ الأَسْوَاقُ تَرْتِيبًا طَبَقِيًّا يَبْدَأُ بِالمِهَنِ النَّظِيفَةِ كَالْعِطَارَةِ وَالكُتُبِ بِالقُرْبِ مِنَ المَسْجِدِ.
sentences.translation: Ove tržnice su organizirane hijerarhijski, počevši od 'čistih' zanata poput parfimerija i knjižara u blizini džamije.
sentences.translationEn: These markets are arranged hierarchically, starting with 'clean' professions such as perfumery and book-selling near the mosque.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا تَعْكِسُ العِمَارَةُ السَّكَنِيَّةُ، بِوَاجِهَاتِهَا الصَّمَّاءِ، مَفْهُومَ "الحُرْمَةِ" وَقَدَاسَةِ الحَيَاةِ الأُسَرِيَّةِ بَعِيدًا عَنِ الأَعْيُنِ.
sentences.translation: Stambena arhitektura, sa svojim zatvorenim fasadama, odražava koncept privatnosti i svetosti porodičnog života daleko od očiju javnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Residential architecture, with its windowless outer facades, reflects the concept of 'privacy' and the sanctity of family life away from prying eyes.

sentences.arabic: فَالبيتُ يَنْكَفِئُ عَلَى ذَاتِهِ مِنْ خِلَالِ الفِنَاءِ الدَّاخِلِيِّ لِيَمْنَحَ قَاطِنِيهِ السَّكِينَةَ وَالرَّاحَةَ.
sentences.translation: Kuća se povlači u sebe kroz unutrašnje dvorište kako bi svojim stanarima pružila mir i udobnost.
sentences.translationEn: The house turns inward through the internal courtyard to grant its inhabitants serenity and comfort.

sentences.arabic: وَتُعَدُّ "المَشْرَبِيَّاتُ" الخَشَبِيَّةُ آيَةً فِي الإِبْدَاعِ، إِذْ تَسْمَحُ بِالرُّؤْيَةِ مِنَ الدَّاخِلِ دُونَ الكَشْفِ عَنِ الأَسْرَارِ.
sentences.translation: Drvene 'mušarapije' (mashrabiyas) su remek-djelo kreativnosti, jer omogućavaju pogled iznutra bez otkrivanja tajni doma.
sentences.translationEn: The wooden 'Mashrabiyas' are a masterpiece of creativity, as they allow viewing from the inside without revealing the secrets of the home.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا التَّصْمِيمَ المِحْوَرِيَّ يَجْعَلُ مِنَ المَنْزِلِ رِئَةً تَتَنَفَّسُ فِي عُمْقِ المَدِينَةِ المُزْدَحِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovakav centralni dizajn čini kuću plućima koja dišu u dubini užurbanog grada.
sentences.translationEn: This axial design makes the house a lung that breathes in the depths of the crowded city.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذَلِكَ، تَكُونُ العِمَارَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ قَدْ صَاغَتْ لُغَةً بَصَرِيَّةً تَتَنَاغَمُ فِيهَا الوَظِيفَةُ مَعَ الرَّمْزِيَّةِ الدِّينِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Time je arapska arhitektura oblikovala vizuelni jezik u kojem se funkcija harmonizuje s religijskom simbolikom.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, Arab architecture has formulated a visual language in which function harmonizes with religious symbolism.

sentences.arabic: وَتَتَحَوَّلُ فِيهَا الحِجَارَةُ الصَّمَّاءُ إِلَى شَوَاهِدَ حَيَّةٍ عَلَى عَبْقَرِيَّةِ المِعْمَارِيِّ العَرَبِيِّ القَدِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Nijemi kamen se pretvara u žive svjedoke genijalnosti starog arapskog graditelja.
sentences.translationEn: Silent stones are transformed into living witnesses to the genius of the ancient Arab architect.

sentences.arabic: فَالجَمَالُ هُنَا لَيْسَ تَرَفًا، بَلْ هُوَ جُزْءٌ لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنْ كِيَانِ المَدِينَةِ وَرُوحِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ljepota ovdje nije luksuz, već neodvojivi dio bića grada i njegovog duha.
sentences.translationEn: Beauty here is not a luxury, but an integral part of the city's being and soul.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا تَبْقَى المَدِينَةُ العَرِيقةُ مَدْرَسَةً تَعْكِسُ عُمْقَ الهُوِيَّةِ وَأَصَالَةَ التُّرَاثِ.
sentences.translation: Tako stari grad ostaje škola koja odražava dubinu identiteta i izvornost baštine.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the ancient city remains a school reflecting the depth of identity and the authenticity of heritage.
